title: SCT-013 Split-Core CT Clamp Current Sensing
design_question: How to measure 0–100 A AC current non-invasively with <0.5 % gain error?
selected_approach: SCT-013-100 (100 A:50 mA, N=2000). Burden R_b=33 Ω → 2.33 V peak. Biased to mid-rail (1.65 V). Sampled at 4800 Hz.
rationale: SCT-013 ±1 % accuracy 10–120 % rated current. Burden voltage <3.3 V safe for ESP32 ADC. 4800 Hz ≫ 2×60 Hz Nyquist.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Requires cutting the monitored wire—defeats non-invasive objective.
Mains-side connection; isolated ADC required; safety risk—rejected.

verification_notes: FACT: 'CT Clamp Current Sensing and RMS Calculation' confirms parameters and open-circuit safety warning.
supporting_fact_titles: CT Clamp Current Sensing and RMS Calculation
